title: EMERGENCY HEAT ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: ASHLAND MUNICIPAL UTILITY EMERGENCY HEAT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides electric, water, and sewer payment assistance. Assistance is limited to once per year and depends on funding available. 2245 Ashland Street Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Must have a disconnect notice, household must meet income limits, and utility must not be more then $100 past due Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Office: Tuesday/Friday 9am-1pm Email (541) 488-6004 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 488-5357 Main phone Main phone (541) 488-6004 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for application FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Disconnect notice, proof of income AREA SERVED: City of Ashland Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Sewer Service Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: UTILITIES - LOW INCOME UTILITIES DISCOUNT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ASHLAND MUNICIPAL UTILITY
